title: botaunomy-reloaded
description: A Botania addon that adds Elven Avatar - upgraded avatar that can interact with the world.
body:
## New versión of Botaunomy mod


- Elven Avatar - an upgraded avatar that can interact with the world.Think of it as a more mystical, mana-oriented autonomous activator.
- Rod of Will - a rod that the elven avatar can use to right-click on blocks.
- Rod of Toil - a rod that the elven avatar can use combined with tools to right-click on blocks.
- Rod of Toil - with Rod of Will left-click on blocks.
- You can use pickaxes, hoes, hatchets… to break blocks.
- You can use tools like shears on entities.
- Can attack entities.
- Can use botania rods like livingwood avatar.
- Avatar holding an Ender Eye activates Mob Spawners.
- Mana can be transferred with a manatablet giving it to the avatar.
- Can use internal mana of the avatar with botania tools.
- Can attach a spark to load mana.
- Animations when breaking blocks or using tools.
- You can insert tools into the avatar with a hopper.
- Emits a redstone pulse (value 1) when mana is consumed.
- Avatar is disabled when there is a strong redstone signal (14-15).
- Comparator emits signal strength proportional mana stored.
- MainHand Command prints the name of the element on the player’s main hand.
- Can be used to transfer mana long distances using mana tablets and Ender Storage mod (see setup screenshot).
- Can use a caster gauntlet for Thaumcraft Infusion.(new).
